generated_oml:
// C1: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor converting electrical input current (_I_M) into rotational torque (_τ_M) for the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearWheelActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gearwheel component in the gearbox transmission system of the first vertical axis, transmitting rotational torque from motor to cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the gearbox transmission system with low gear ratio, transforming input torque (_τ_G) into final output torque (_τ_out) for the robot axis"
]

instance SafetyCell : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearWheelActuator, CycloidalGearboxActuator
    base:desc "Operational safety boundary restricting working range to [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed to 75°/s for the first vertical axis"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder attached to the motor shaft measuring angular position for the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder located behind the gearbox measuring output angle to reduce backlash/positional uncertainty by comparing with motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current (_I_M) to derive torque (_τ_M) via motor-specific constants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance CombinedPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing structural components (motor, gearbox) and flow definitions (rotational torque/velocity, electrical current) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance AssetModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MABI Asset Model describing the physical first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot and its sensor/actuator connections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance FrictionFreeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink base model simulating friction-free behavior of the first axis (Fig. 4a)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for the gear system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink friction model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics for the gear system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink friction model implementing LuGre friction characteristics for the gear system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured input current (_I_M) data streamed via MQTT from motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured motor position data streamed via MQTT from motor position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured gearbox output angle data streamed via MQTT from gearbox position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data (_τ_r_M, _τ_r_G) from friction models for comparison with real data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CombinedPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data from friction models for comparison with real data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CombinedPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for real-time data streaming from sensors to the digital shadow (input current, output angle, torque, angular velocity)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment hosting friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre) and simulation components"
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool used for creating Block Definition Diagrams (BDDs) and Asset Models for the digital twin components"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework for linking physical and digital representations of the first axis through operational context"
]

// C6: Services
instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data aggregation service streaming sensor data (input current, output angle, torque, angular velocity) via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceLinkingInsight
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction identification service using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic exchange service for adapting friction models via MATLAB Simulink to account for wear, load, or temperature changes"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization interface comparing reference vs. simulated data (torque/velocity traces) for detecting friction-induced deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance ControlAlgorithmOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration service for friction-aware models into model-based control algorithms for improved robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataTraceLinkingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Each data point is associated with its source (motor encoder, gearbox sensors) and processed through engineering models to derive contextualized friction behavior"
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components with dependencies (load, temperature) for motion accuracy improvement"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction-induced inaccuracies (~30% reduction potential) through comparison of reference vs. simulated data traces"
]

instance ControlOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction models to minimize motion inaccuracies via model-based control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Early detection of gearbox degradation via friction model drift analysis for predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and event-driven**:
  - **Data Sampling Rate**: Sensor data (e.g., encoders, current) is streamed at **high frequency** (implied by live operational context) to capture dynamic friction effects.
  - **Model Update Frequency**: Friction models are continuously refined during operation, with updates triggered by **operational events** (e.g., changes in load, temperature, or wear).
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces and model outputs are aligned temporally to ensure **coherent analysis** of friction behavior over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **Single Digital Shadow**: Focused on the **first axis** of the MABI MAX 100 robot, integrating:
    - **Physical Components**: Motor, gearbox, encoders.
    - **Virtual Components**: Simulation models (Simulink), data traces, and processing pipelines (e.g., friction model refinement).
  - **Orchestration**: Data flows from sensors → MQTT → Digital Shadow → Dashboard for friction analysis and control optimization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As Designed (Ideal)**: Simulated friction-free behavior (Fig. 4a) for baseline comparisons.
  - **As Manufactured (Operational)**: Real-time friction modeling during robot operation, with continuous updates via live data.
  - **As Operated**: Dynamic adaptation of friction models to account for wear, tooling changes, or environmental factors (e.g., temperature)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**:
    - **White-Box Models**: Analytical friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) validated against real-world data.
    - **Black-Box Models**: Data-driven models trained on live operational data to capture dynamic friction effects.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**:
    - **Sensor Redundancy**: Two encoders per axis reduce positional uncertainty by comparing signals.
    - **Traceability**: Data points are linked to their computational origins (e.g., motor dynamics, friction models) to validate consistency.
  - **Verification/Validation**: Continuous comparison of **measured vs. simulated data** (e.g., torque/velocity traces) to detect deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Data Transmission**: MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (e.g., current, angle, torque).
  - **Model Integration**: Simulation models (Simulink) and engineering models (SysML) interact via **processing pipelines** to compute friction-aware outputs.
  - **Dashboard Interface**: Visualization layer connects to the DT to display real-time friction analysis."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **SysML (Model-Based Systems Engineering)**: For structural and behavioral modeling.
  - **MQTT Protocol**: For real-time data communication.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: For traceability and data aggregation (Fig. 1)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety Cell**: Restricts operational range to [-90°, 90°] and limits speed to 75°/s to prevent accidents.
  - **Data Integrity**: Traceability ensures no unauthorized modifications to friction models or sensor data.
  - **Remote Operation**: DT can provide **friction-aware control algorithms** without direct physical intervention (e.g., for machining tasks)."
]
